markers: CLI and Streamlit study workflow in `cp_study_tool/controller/cli.py` and `cp_study_tool/ui/app.py`
Agent pipeline modules for task generation, explanation, visualization, dashboarding, and evaluation
No standalone lecture repository, algorithm library, or educational image corpus found

summary.overall: This is an ABPath Clinical Pathology study application with a small built-in question bank and supporting runtime code. It does not contain separate lecture or algorithm content collections; the only direct educational payload is the offline multiple-choice question set.

algorithms.note: No migratable algorithm content found as a standalone file set.

lectures.note: No migratable lecture content found as a standalone file set.

images.note: No project-owned educational image assets found.

tutorials.note: Small offline MCQ bank covering transfusion medicine, chemistry, hematology, microbiology, and immunology.

externalServices: OpenAI API via `OPENAI_API_KEY` for optional LLM-backed generation
notes: Local SQLite state at `~/.cpstudy/cpstudy.sqlite3` unless overridden by `CPSTUDY_DB_PATH`

recommendation: Migrate `cp_study_tool/data/questions.json` first if you want reusable study content. Treat the rest of the repo as application scaffolding unless you intentionally want to port the CLI/UI and agent pipeline.
